$comment: Boil-the-Ocean Layer 2: active checkpoint before any Write/Edit/MultiEdit. Surfaces the 10-section sweep into context before the tool fires. Runs through run-with-flags.js so ECC_HOOK_PROFILE / ECC_DISABLED_HOOKS gating still applies. The full sweep runs in CI (Layer 3); this is the --quick variant.

PreToolUse.description: Boil-the-Ocean Layer 2: run tools/boil-review.js --quick before Write/Edit/MultiEdit so the 10-section checklist becomes context. Non-blocking — exits 0 on any failure.
